display.purpose: Blog post titles. The largest element on any page.

headline.purpose: Section headings and blog card titles.

motion.name: fade-in-up
motion.purpose: Page entrance animation with staggered delays (80ms increments, up to 5 stages).

motion.name: theme-toggle-reveal
motion.purpose: View Transitions circle animation originating from the theme toggle button.

motion.name: icon-rotate
motion.purpose: Sun/moon icon rotation during theme switch.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for fade-in and structural transitions.

motion.name: ease-interactive
motion.purpose: Easing for hover and icon state changes.

components.name: Blog Card
components.description: Post list item with title and date badge. Bordered row, not a visual card.
components.html: It's called a PR "review" for a reasonMay 22, 2026
components.css: .ds-blog-card { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.06); color: #09090b; text-decoration: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, background-color 0.15s; } .ds-blog-card:hover { border-color: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.09); background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); } .ds-blog-card-title { font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; flex: 1; } .ds-blog-card:hover .ds-blog-card-title { color: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.8); } .ds-blog-card-date { flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.6); background: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.03); width: 96px; text-align: center; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 4px; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Muted Link
components.description: Secondary navigation link. Muted at rest, full ink on hover.
components.css: .ds-link-muted { font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.6); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s; } .ds-link-muted:hover { color: #09090b; } .ds-link-muted:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.2); outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Site Header
components.description: Brand name as bold text link with theme toggle and a thin horizontal rule beneath.
components.html: Satej Bidvai
components.css: .ds-site-header-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-site-header-brand { font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 700; color: #09090b; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1; transition: opacity 0.15s; } .ds-site-header-brand:hover { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-theme-toggle { position: relative; padding: 12px; margin-top: -8px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; background: transparent; color: #09090b; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s; } .ds-theme-toggle:hover { opacity: 0.7; } .ds-sun-icon { stroke-width: 2; } .ds-site-header-rule { width: 56px; height: 1px; background: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.15); }

components.name: Date Badge
components.description: Compact timestamp badge used in blog card rows.
components.css: .ds-date-badge { font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.6); background: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.03); width: 96px; text-align: center; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 4px; white-space: nowrap; display: inline-block; }

components.name: Prose Link
components.description: In-article external link with subtle underline that lightens on hover.
components.css: .ds-prose-link { color: #09090b; text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.15); text-underline-offset: 2px; transition: text-decoration-color 0.15s; } .ds-prose-link:hover { text-decoration-color: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.075); } .ds-prose-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.2); outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
A single sheet of paper, set in good type, with nothing on it that doesn't need to be there. The site is closer to a well-typeset book page than a web application. Every pixel of chrome is earned; the default state of any element is "absent." The reading experience is the entire product.

The system rejects spectacle, decoration, and density. No gradient meshes, no particle effects, no project-card grids, no testimonial carousels. The visual hierarchy is built entirely from type weight, opacity, and whitespace. Color is structural (foreground, background, border), never decorative.
keyCharacteristics: Monochrome palette with opacity-based hierarchy (no accent hue)
Single typeface (Geist Variable) carrying all roles through weight and size alone
Narrow reading column (max 48rem) with generous vertical rhythm
Dark and light themes as true inversions, not separate palettes
Motion restricted to state feedback; no choreography

rules.name: The No-Hue Rule
rules.body: No accent color. No brand hue. Hierarchy comes from opacity and weight, never from a colored element.

rules.name: The Opacity-as-Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Every text color is the same hue at a different opacity. 100% is primary, 85% is accent, 60% is muted.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Geist Variable is the only typeface. No serif for editorial feel, no mono for technical cred.

rules.name: The Weight-Gap Rule
rules.body: Adjacent hierarchy levels differ by at least one weight step (400 vs 500, 500 vs 700). Same-weight adjacent levels are forbidden.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are prohibited. If an element needs visual separation, use a border at 15% opacity or whitespace.

dos: Do build hierarchy exclusively through type weight, scale, and opacity.
Do use the narrow column (max-w-3xl / ~48rem) for all content.
Do respect the opacity scale: 100% primary, 85% accent, 60% muted, 15% border.
Do support both light and dark themes as true inversions.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion with complete animation removal.
Do use Geist Variable for all text.
Do use text-pretty or text-balance on display-level headings.
donts: Don't add an accent color. The monochrome palette is a deliberate constraint.
Don't use shadows or elevation of any kind.
Don't add particle effects, 3D elements, scroll-hijacking animations, or spectacle.
Don't use the template-portfolio pattern: colorful hero, icon-grid skills, testimonial carousel.
Don't use gradient meshes, glassmorphism, neon-on-dark, or stacked identical card grids.
Don't make the blog look like a documentation site.
Don't add illustrations or decorative SVGs.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
